scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w server && npm run lint:fix -w web
scripts.format: npm run format -w server && npm run format -w web
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w server && npm run format:check -w web
scripts.ci: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web && npm run format:check -w server && npm run format:check -w web && npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web && npm run test:run -w server
